attacking_style: Rarely initiates; exploits tactical stalemates with perfectly timed bridges in final 3-5km. Won Paris-Roubaix reading late chaos, placed 2nd at Flanders bridging to stalled Pogačar/Van der Poel group.
team_tactics: Elite super-domestique executing organized chases on key climbs (Paterberg lead-outs) and flat tempo control. INEOS weaponized him via crosswind exploitation before his Paris-Roubaix win. Quick-Step used multi-rider break saturation.
terrain_preference: Cobbled classics with late positioning battles suit best. Strong time trialist (Dutch TT champion, early Vuelta TT leader). Can handle steep punchy gradients (pulled Roglič to flamme rouge on climbs).
vulnerability: Pure sprint finishes against top-tier fastmen expose form ceiling (relegated to chase group at E3 2022). Cannot produce explosive attacks when teams organize; relies on others' tactical errors.
key_patterns: Transformed from domestique to winner within INEOS system (2021 Roubaix time-cut to 2022 victory).
Executes organized classic chases on hellingen, reabsorbing breaks via tempo (Paterberg, multiple observations).
Triple-team loading in breakaways when riding for Quick-Step (Tour/Vuelta flat control, break saturation).
National TT form translates to early provisional leads but fades against GT specialists.
Opportunistic podium challenges in stage races when team GC priorities allow (BinckBank, Dauphiné win).
Very early sprint timing from reduced groups, holding off chasers (Dauphiné uphill finish win).
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 showed team domestique reversion (Vuelta flat work), stepping back from 2022 monument breakthrough. No podium signals since spring 2022.
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 11
2021 Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres
2022 Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres
